narrative:
Marysville 17 (precinct in Union County) has 877 registered voters, with 49.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.7 percentage points.
